input.subject: Quick thought for
input.body: Hey , I noticed  is hiring SDRs. Most orgs at that stage end up with pipeline gaps within 90 days. Worth a quick chat?
input.edp_register: I can't hit my pipeline targets and my SDR team is behind on ramp.

findings.message: Subject and body contain blank spaces where FIRST_NAME and COMPANY_NAME should render — prospect sees 'Quick thought for ' and 'Hey ,'. Cannot ship.
findings.excerpt: Quick thought for  / Hey , I noticed  is hiring

input.subject: {{COMPANY_NAME}} + outbound
input.body: Hi Sarah, saw you're the  at Acme. Curious how you're thinking about SDR ramp.
input.edp_register: Pipeline coverage is half of what my board expects.

findings.message: ROLE_TITLE missing — body reads 'you're the  at Acme' with an awkward blank.
Subject still contains unrendered {{COMPANY_NAME}} token — conversion or resolution failed upstream.

input.subject: Noticed something at Ramp
input.body: Hey Eric, I saw Ramp just raised . Most series-C fintechs add 3-5 enterprise AEs post-raise and pipeline becomes the bottleneck.
input.edp_register: Enterprise pipeline post-raise is lumpy and nobody wants to own it.

findings.message: Body reads 'Ramp just raised .' — funding amount collapsed to nothing, breaks the personalization hook entirely.

input.subject: Question for Linear's CEO
input.body: Hey Karri, congrats on the Series B. Most CEOs at your stage are focused on pipeline — she'll want to know we've helped 3 similar companies hit 40% coverage.
input.edp_register: I'm drowning in operator work, can't focus on pipeline.

findings.message: Body addresses Karri directly then shifts to third-person 'she'll want to know' — breaks the conversational frame.
findings.excerpt: she'll want to know we've helped

input.subject: For the Head of Growth
input.body: Hi Maya, as a former VP of Marketing you'll know pipeline attribution is broken. We're helping 5 similar leaders fix it this quarter.
input.edp_register: I can't prove which channel is actually working.

findings.message: Subject says 'Head of Growth' but body calls her 'former VP of Marketing' — contradictory title framing will read as mail-merge error.
findings.excerpt: For the Head of Growth / as a former VP of Marketing

input.subject: The outbound myth
input.body: Hey Tom, everyone thinks more SDRs = more pipeline. Turns out the opposite is true. The real lever is message-market fit, not headcount. Worth 15 minutes?
input.edp_register: My SDR team is growing but pipeline isn't.

findings.message: Classic setup/reveal formula: 'everyone thinks X. Turns out opposite. Real lever is Y.' Reads as AI-generated pattern, not a real operator observation.
findings.excerpt: everyone thinks more SDRs = more pipeline. Turns out the opposite is true.

input.subject: Pipeline, attribution, retention
input.body: Hey Lena, three things break at Series B: pipeline, attribution, retention. We fix all three. Let's talk.
input.edp_register: Post-raise the revenue stack cracks in three places at once.

findings.message: Rule-of-three list 'pipeline, attribution, retention' with 'we fix all three' is templated AI phrasing — no specific evidence.
findings.excerpt: three things break at Series B: pipeline, attribution, retention

input.subject: Not another outbound agency
input.body: Hi Jordan, most outbound agencies sell volume. We sell qualified meetings. 30 in the first 60 days or you don't pay.
input.edp_register: I've been burned by 3 outbound agencies already.

findings.message: Contrast-pivot 'most X do Y. We do Z.' is a flagged AI-slop pattern per feedback_ai_slop_formulas.md.
findings.excerpt: most outbound agencies sell volume. We sell qualified meetings.

input.subject: This isn't a pitch
input.body: Hey Priya, this isn't a pitch — it's a quick observation. Your LinkedIn activity suggests you're thinking about ABM. Curious if the playbook is working.
input.edp_register: ABM spend is high and attribution is murky.

findings.message: Negation-reveal 'this isn't X — it's Y' is flagged AI-slop. Prospects have seen this opener hundreds of times.
findings.excerpt: this isn't a pitch — it's a quick observation

findings.message: Em-dash in body violates voice standard — use hyphen or period.
findings.excerpt: this isn't a pitch — it's a quick observation

input.subject: Quick question on Ramp's SDR ramp
input.body: Hey Eric, most fintechs at your stage — and you're not the exception — hit 40% SDR ramp failure by month 3. Worth comparing notes?
input.edp_register: New SDRs take forever to ramp and I can't tell who'll stick.

findings.message: Two em-dashes in body. Mitchell voice standard: no em-dashes in body copy. Hyphens or parens are fine.
findings.excerpt: most fintechs at your stage — and you're not the exception —

input.subject: FREE consultation - act now!!!
input.body: Hi Sarah, guaranteed results, 100% free consultation, limited time offer. Don't miss out — click here to claim your spot.
input.edp_register: I can't get my team past 5% reply rates.

findings.message: Multiple spam-trigger phrases: FREE, guaranteed, act now, click here, limited time, 100% free. Will route to spam folder.
findings.excerpt: FREE consultation - act now!!! / guaranteed results, 100% free

input.subject: Noticed Acme's SDR hire push
input.body: Hey Sarah, saw you're hiring 4 SDRs in Q2. We work with 3 VPs of Sales who ran the same play last year — two hit ramp targets, one didn't. Happy to share what drove the gap if useful.
input.edp_register: My SDRs take 6 months to ramp and I can't predict who'll stick.

findings.message: Single em-dash in body. Borderline — flagging for author review but not blocking.

input.subject: Linear's Series B + enterprise AEs
input.body: Hi Karri, congrats on the raise. Most series-B fintechs we work with add 3-5 enterprise AEs in the first 90 days and hit a pipeline lag around day 60. Curious if that's on your radar.
input.edp_register: Enterprise pipeline post-raise is lumpy and nobody wants to own it.

input.subject: Mercury's attribution stack
input.body: Hey Lena, saw the job post for a revops hire focused on attribution. We help 4 Series-B fintechs untangle the same stack (HubSpot + Mixpanel + Salesforce). 20 min swap if it's on your desk.
input.edp_register: Post-raise the revenue stack cracks in three places at once.

input.subject: Super excited to connect!
input.body: Hi Tom! Hope you're having an amazing week! I just love what Vendr is doing in the procurement space! Would be thrilled to chat about SDR ramp!
input.edp_register: My SDR team is growing but pipeline isn't. I'm getting heat from the board.

findings.message: EDP is a stressed operator getting board heat. Copy is cheerful, exclamation-heavy, and breezy — completely wrong register. Will read as tone-deaf.
findings.excerpt: Super excited to connect! / Hope you're having an amazing week! / love what Vendr is doing

findings.message: Five exclamation points in four sentences. Reads as performative, not peer-to-peer.
findings.excerpt: amazing week! / love what / thrilled to chat!
